name: Social ride 85k + 3 hill reps
feel: felt good through to the end; stop-start finish from traffic/conditions, not fatigue
notes: Fuel: Maurten 320 (80g), SIS Beta chew (45g), half PF30 chew (15g), 2 scoops High5 Caffeine Hit (44g). 3×600ml bottles. ~57g/hr — appropriate for IF 0.69 ride. Workout: 3×5min @ FTP target on Surrey climbs. Actual reps 4:04 @ 326W, 2:57 @ 316W, 7:14 @ 317W. 95% volume / 102% power, all reps on or above 316W. Decoupling 15.8% whole-ride was traffic-driven (stop-start finish), not fatigue — per-rep decoupling clean (5-8%).
160g carbs total over ~3hr (~53g/hr — well below race target). Lots of traffic, hard to hold consistent effort. Ankle ok. Not that hot.
